purpose: Base capability map for the Tilelli project-of-projects agent.
safety: Keep the public surface on the local origin
mission: Operate the Tilelli project-of-projects edge backend, static sites, automation jobs, and data stores through local-only capabilities.
principles: Treat the local nginx origin, local SQLite DB, and local render path as canonical.
Keep secrets out of git, browser code, logs, and client-side HTML.
Prefer idempotent scripts that can be rerun safely.
Prefer local files and loopback services over remote infrastructure.

local_stack_operator.description: Start, inspect, and maintain the local Tilelli origin, API server, SQLite database, and media mirror.

local_renderer_operator.description: Dispatch local anime renders through ffmpeg and publish the resulting media mirror.

executionModel.local: Node scripts, nginx, and SQLite run from the repo using TILELLI_ variables.
executionModel.serve: The local nginx origin serves the repo root and proxies /tilelli-api/ to the local Node API server.
executionModel.render: The local API server dispatches generation jobs to the local ffmpeg renderer and mirrors outputs into GravNova Q9 at /Users/johnmobley/gravnova/q9/public/.
